response.justification: The candidate is highly experienced in senior roles with expertise in multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, D, C++, etc.) and advanced technologies, but lacks direct experience with Java, the primary required language for this junior role. Their extensive background in full-stack and system development may lead to overqualification or misalignment with entry-level expectations. German proficiency is also limited to basic level, which does not meet the required fluent communication standard.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and architectural skills demonstrated through diverse tech stack experience
Active involvement in open-source and community-driven projects
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies quickly
concerns: No demonstrated experience with Java or object-oriented programming in Java
German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting the required fluent level
Significant overqualification for an entry-level position may lead to disengagement or role mismatch
